text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Having reached the end of her Tiara tour, Air
Groove has earned significant renown as the
Empress, and the public watches her with fervor.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: However, she's not alone in the limelight.

text_block_list.name: TV Caster
text_block_list.text:
Silence Suzuka is in the lead! Silence Suzuka is in
the lead!

text_block_list.name: TV Caster
text_block_list.text:
And she crosses the finishing line in first! Nobody
can take that lead from her! She's incredible!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The other racer making waves is an Umamusume
known as the Otherworldly Front-Runner—Silence
Suzuka.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
When considering Air Groove's future challenges,
Silence Suzuka is someone who can't be ignored.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Air Groove's senior year is almost upon us. I need
to talk to her about our plans.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The student council is holding a large-scale
scrimmage event today to help everyone improve
their skills.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Naturally, Air Groove is helping organize, so I
decide to lend a hand as well.

text_block_list.name: Umamusume Spectator A
text_block_list.text: Look, look! Isn't that Silence Suzuka?

text_block_list.name: Umamusume Spectator B
text_block_list.text:
Whoa! Yeah, it is! I didn't know she was running in
the scrimmages today!

text_block_list.name: Participating Umamusume A
text_block_list.text:
We're so lucky! How many chances do you get to
go all out with Silence Suzuka?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Spectators and participants alike are excited by
Silence Suzuka's presence.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Is that... Suzuka?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Air Groove is also looking at Silence Suzuka, a
look of astonishment visible upon her face.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
You may not be aware of this, but Suzuka and I
are already acquainted with one another.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
We've practiced together a number of times. I
thought I was well aware of her potential.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: However...

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Something's happened to her. She's nothing like
she was before.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
In simple terms... She has a completely different
air about her.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Since beginning our Twinkle Series careers, we
may have run into each other now and then at the
academy, but we haven't actually met on the
track.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: I've seen footage of her running, of course, but I had no idea she had come this far...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As a highly talented Umamusume herself, Air
Groove must be able to sense something in
Silence Suzuka that I can't.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She keeps her gaze fixed on Suzuka for a few
excruciating seconds, until...

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: I need to find out for myself.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She dashes off without warning, and I chase after
her in a fluster.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Things seem to be progressing without issue. The
next group is—

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: President!

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Air Groove? Is there an issue in the stands?

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: No, there's no issue. I have a personal request.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: And what might that be?

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
I am fully aware that this is out of line, but I want
to ask if I can race against Suzuka.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
It's rare for you to ask something of me. I would
happily oblige, but the allocations for Silence
Suzuka's group are already—

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: I would like to make the same request.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Suzuka!

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: You wish to race against Air Groove?

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
I do. I'm also curious to see how she has changed
since we last ran together.

text_block_list.name: Umamusume Spectator B
text_block_list.text: Air Groove is gonna race against Silence Suzuka?!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume Spectator A
text_block_list.text: Omigosh, no way! We've gotta see this!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The Umamusume nearby perk up at the potential
matchup and word begins to spread.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
My goodness. I can't exactly say no now, can I?
You have my consent. I'll sort out the
arrangements.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Thank you very much for your magnanimity.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
True to her word, Rudolf quickly organizes a
scrimmage between Air Groove and Silence
Suzuka, and soon enough...

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Huff, huff, huff!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Silence Suzuka races ahead and takes the lead,
with Air Groove giving chase. So far, the scene on
the track is playing out just as everyone expects.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
(Ngh... What incredible speed! She's always been
a front runner, but this is on an entirely different
level!)

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: (But I haven't let her slip out of my range yet... I will snatch that lead from her!)

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As the race reaches the final turn, Air Groove
attempts to surge forward, but...

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Hahhh!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: (What the—?!)

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Silence Suzuka picks up her pace. Try as she
might to close in, Air Groove finds herself only
falling even farther behind.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: (There's no way...)

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Air Groove finishes the race without even
managing to catch Silence Suzuka's shadow.

text_block_list.name: Umamusume Spectator A
text_block_list.text:
D-did you see that?! She was in front the whole
time, but somehow she still zoomed ahead at the
end! Talk about wild!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume Spectator B
text_block_list.text:
She managed to stay ahead of Air Groove!
That's... unbelievable.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Good race, Air Groove.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Y-yeah... Congratulations.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
You were magnificent, Suzuka. I'm glad I was able
to race you today.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
Me too. I look forward to facing you in a proper
match.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Yes... As do I.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Well then, until we meet again.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Ngh...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
That night in my office, I think back on Air
Groove and Silence Suzuka's race.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: I thought you might be here.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
I have something to discuss with you. Or rather, I
have a request.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
I want you to enter me in a race where I'm likely
to go up against Suzuka.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
You saw what happened today. She completely
outclassed me.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
In the challenges that lie ahead, Suzuka presents
an obstacle that I will need to overcome.
choice_data_list: Then let's aim for the Osaka Hai.
Then let's aim for the Osaka Hai.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Trainer...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Of all our options in the near future, this is the
race where Silence Suzuka is most likely to show.
If we want to face her, it has to be our best bet.
choice_data_list: Let's take down Silence Suzuka together.
Let's take down Silence Suzuka together.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
...Thank you for indulging my selfish request. I
promise you, this time I won't lose.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, we make beating Silence Suzuka our next
goal.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Our next race is the Osaka Hai! We can't leave
things as they stand now!
